name: Chicken Chunks with Peanuts in Spicy Sauce
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SAUCE-----------------------------------
1. Mix all sauce ingredients in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Heat the sauce to simmer.
3. Add green onions and peanuts about a minute before serving.
4. At the last minute, add chicken pieces to the sauce and mix quickly.
Trim ends off green onions and cut into 1-inch sections.
Pull skin off breasts, then pull meat from bones. Slice meat into 1-inch strips, then crosswise to make 1-inch chunks.
In a large bowl, beat egg white with water chestnut flour using a single chopstick. Stir chicken pieces into the mixture until thoroughly coated. Marinate for 5 minutes.
Deep-frying: Heat oil in a wok or deep fryer to medium heat. Fry peanuts until light tan color. Remove and drain on paper towel.
Fry coated chicken chunks until golden brown, frying no more than 8 at a time. Use chopsticks or spatula to keep pieces separate while frying. Remove with chopsticks or slotted spoon.
